capabilities_used.evidence: 整体表达长期偏多且偏好顺大趋势做回踩/续涨。例：2025-07-31 说“Buyers still aggressively in control”；图 7 把 ETH 从底部买点、支撑守住、支撑收回、阻力突破一路串成上升趋势交易框架。
他反复把行情理解成区间/箱体折磨。2025-12-31 直接命名“Box of despair / Box of Hell”；图 5 把 BTC 描述为“Tight and compressed channel”，先识别整理区再等待方向选择。
图 1 红框圈出 ETH 在强势上涨后的短暂横向回落整理，随后继续拉升；图 5 也是强突破后进入紧凑通道，配合上升趋势线，典型延续思维而不是猜顶。
图 3、图 7 多次明确写“Fakeout, support reclaimed”，本质是跌破关键位后迅速收回，先扫流动性再恢复趋势；这类‘先骗线、再收回’是他非常常见的结构语言。
图 8 中 BTC 价格冲到趋势线附近新高，但下方 OBV 走低，强调冲高并不健康；2026-03-31 也写到“Get the dip buyers excited with a bounce... Then continue the drop even further”，明显是在交易假动作/诱多诱空。
图 3 与图 8 都体现了前高/前低附近刺破后回落或收回的 swing failure 视角；2025-10-31 还直说“obvious bear div is pretty bearish”，说明他会在前高附近寻找失败信号而非盲追突破。
虽然图中未直接放布林带，但他大量交易‘压缩-扩张’。图 5 明确写“Tight and compressed channel”，随后预期向上释放；其语言和 setup 非常接近波动压缩后的突破框架。
2025-10-31 直接说“the obvious bear div is pretty bearish”；2025-07-31 又提醒“RSI can stay overbought a lot longer than people think”，说明他会用 RSI 背离，但不会机械地把超买当顶部。
2025-08-31 连续看多 ETH 与 ETHBTC：一边说“$ETH - OBV still giving me no reason to sell”，一边说“$ETHBTC - Still in a nice uptrend”；这反映他会用 ETH/BTC 强弱来判断资金是否从 BTC 轮动到山寨龙头。
2024-07-31 写“$DXY - ... people are watching the US dollar losing strength”，明确把美元走弱视为股票/比特币风险偏好的支撑，说明他会把 DXY 当宏观确认层。
2024-07-31 连续写“Here's the PPD - Post Powell Dump”与“Wonder if we'll get the post Powell speech dump now.”，说明他会围绕美联储事件做预期管理，至少会识别事件前后的波动与风险偏好切换。
2026-01-31 说“Bitcoin ETFs. The real liquidity and buying power is only tied to the markets being open. It's a market maker chop fest over the weekends”，这是把 ETF 开盘/休市带来的流动性差异纳入 BTC 价格行为解释。
2025-09-30 说“Last day of September, end of month volatility”；2024-10-31 说“End of month volatility at the end of earnings week.”，说明他明显重视月底/事件周的波动环境变化。
他经常谈 euphoria、timeline 过度看多与局部顶部。2025-10-31 说“people forget how euphoric and bullish the timeline was at this local top”；2024-02-29 也警告“buying on euphoric moves is not ideal.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: OBV Lead-Lag Confirmation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use On-Balance Volume as a leading signal: OBV breakout or trendline break is treated as confirmation that price will likely follow; OBV weakness/divergence is a reason to avoid fresh longs or trim.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把 OBV 当作领先指标使用：OBV 先突破或先走强，则预期价格随后跟进；若 OBV 走弱或背离，则不追多或分批减仓。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-07-31：“Ethereum OBV has broken local resistance already. As a leading indicator this often means that price will follow”；2025-08-31：“$ETH - OBV still giving me no reason to sell.”；图 4 是 OBV 水平阻力突破，图 8 是价格新高但 OBV 走低。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Incremental Strength Selling
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Rather than all-in/all-out, sell fixed portions into strength near target zones, especially after breakouts, euphoric pushes, or when local upside objectives are reached.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 不是一次性清仓，而是在目标位、突破后拉升段、情绪过热区按固定比例分批止盈。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-09-30：“$ETH - Selling another 10% to make sure we see $5k in Pumptober.”；图 3、图 7 都在关键目标/突破后标注“Selling 10%”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Breakdown Reclaim Continuation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: A breakdown that quickly reclaims prior support is treated as a bullish reset, often better than a clean breakout because weak hands are flushed first.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 关键支撑被跌破后快速收回，视为更强的多头重置，因为先清洗了弱手再恢复原趋势。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图 3、图 7 多次直接标注“Fakeout, support reclaimed”“Support reclaimed”；2025-07-31 对股票也说“Looks like nothing more than re-testing a breakout.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Month-End / Event Window Volatility
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Expect unusual volatility and fake moves around month-end, earnings clusters, weekends, and major macro windows; reduce certainty and look for flushes/retests rather than clean trend continuation.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在月底、财报密集期、周末和重大宏观事件窗口，预期更高波动与假动作；此时降低确定性，更关注冲洗、回测和反抽而非线性趋势延续。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-09-30：“Last day of September, end of month volatility to finish out the month.”；2024-10-31：“End of month volatility at the end of earnings week.”；2026-01-31 提到周末 ETF 休市导致 BTC 更容易被搅动。

personal_quirks.quote: Where you exit a coin is more impressive than where your entry was.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 交易能力不只看抄底，更看能否在情绪高点和目标区有效兑现利润。

personal_quirks.quote: You will be wrong many times with trading but there's a difference between being wrong with a good setup and being wrong taking a terrible trade that you emotionally went too big on...
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 允许 setup 失效，但不允许情绪化重仓的烂交易；先保证过程质量，再谈结果。

personal_quirks.quote: If you wanted to buy stocks yesterday but not today you are doing it backwards. Looks like nothing more than re-testing a breakout.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不追涨杀跌；更偏好突破后的回测确认，而不是情绪驱动地在拉升时才想买。

personal_quirks.quote: RSI can stay overbought a lot longer than people think.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 强趋势里不要机械地把超买当顶部，要结合结构与动量环境。

personal_quirks.quote: Get the dip buyers excited with a bounce, get the bears nervous and have them close their shorts. Then continue the drop even further...
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 市场常通过反弹和回落反复折磨两边仓位，先识别诱导路径，再决定是否跟随。

unique_traits: 他不是纯图形派，也不是纯宏观派，而是把结构、趋势、情绪和日历窗口揉成一个非常实战化的 swing 框架。与很多 TA 交易员不同，他极度重视 OBV 这类成交量先行信号，并且习惯用“假跌破后收回支撑”来定义更优质的多头重置。另一个鲜明特点是分批卖出而不是死拿到单一终点，这让他的 profile 更像一个会管理仓位的趋势投机者，而不是只画目标位的内容型分析师。

high_conviction_phrases: still giving me no reason to sell
